**Plan complete! Here's a full summary:**

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| 🎯 Intent | `support` (broken product + refund demand) |
| 😡 Sentiment | `angry` |
| 👑 Customer Tier | `vip` (17 interactions) |
| 📟 Action Taken | **CSM paged** for `cu_alice` / ticket `tk_8842` |

The on-call Customer Success Manager has been paged with full context. Since this was a VIP + angry combination, we escalated directly rather than routing to finance (even though a refund was mentioned) or dropping it. The CSM can handle both the support issue and any billing/refund resolution personally.
